title: Update the reader Firmware
description: Triggers a firmware update on the reader

command.description: The value for the key command must be set_os

command_id.description: A unique ID that will be echoed back in the command response by the reader.

payload.title: set_os
payload.description:
Update the OS software on the device

The HTTP Server should return json array of files available in the folder when query HTTP GET to url provided

HTTP1.1 GET http://10.17.231.77:8080/3.9.17 -> ["response.txt", "response_ext.txt" ...]

authenticationType.description: Authentication method used by the file server. Allowed values: NONE, BASIC.

url.description: URL of the file server location that hosts the firmware files.

options.description: BASIC authentication credentials for the file server.
